_comment: Chosen deal-risk framework for the deal-read skill. Edit this file to tune the model; do not recite it in prose. MEDDPICC-derived plus engagement signals. The healthy/at_risk signals are concrete observable cues that keep scoring consistent run-to-run. This is a chosen framework, not a graded predictive model: do NOT add a 'weight' field or anything claiming a dimension predicts loss. Grading dimensions against real win/loss outcomes is a central, pooled, reviewed data product, never something this local per-rep skill does or builds toward. If such a model ever exists it is produced elsewhere and shipped here as updated cues; the deal-read skill only consumes the chosen framework.

legal_status._comment: Values of Opportunity.Legal_Status__c that count as 'paper not meaningfully started' for the paper_not_started flag. The model weighs the flag against days_to_close for severity (paper not started with a near close date is the loud signal). Edit if your org uses 'NA' to mean 'no legal review required' rather than 'not yet started' — if so, drop it from this list.

discovery_checklist: Budget or willingness to spend surfaced
Decision process and criteria asked about
Pain quantified in the buyer's words
Concrete next step with a date set

calendar._comment: Read-only Google Calendar lookup. Used for historical meeting context and upcoming scheduled meetings. Hygiene remains Salesforce-only.

scoring._comment: Deterministic Calendar flags. Only fire when Calendar coverage is available; connector gaps remain source gaps, not risk flags.

pipeline._comment: Pipeline-level roll-up controls. 'flag_severity' is a chosen ordering of compute.py's per-deal flags into tiers, used to rank deals by severity of current evidence. It is not a predictive weight.

forecast._comment: Forecast-mode choices. These are deterministic posture and label options, not predictive weights. rollup.py owns recommendation labels; SKILL.md only explains them.

hygiene._comment: Data-quality lens for /pipeline-hygiene. This remains Salesforce-only and is not deal-risk or win-probability scoring.

flags.no_contact_roles: No OpportunityContactRole is logged on the opportunity.
flags.single_threaded: Only one contact is logged on the opportunity.
flags.no_champion: No logged contact role matches a champion role.
flags.overdue_close: CloseDate is in the past but the opportunity is still open.

internal_evidence._comment: Read-only internal evidence lane for mapped fund-admin deal rooms. auto uses mapped deal rooms only; force permits bounded fallback lookup. These sources can affect confidence, gaps, risk notes, and next-move wording, never Salesforce-owned opportunity truth or deterministic risk ranking.
internal_evidence._workflow_tools_comment: Registry of internal SaaS workflow-notification sender domains (CLM, NDA/legal, call intel, CRM auto-update) that live in the rep's own inbox and carry deal-stage truth. These feed the internal-evidence lane ONLY (confidence, source gaps, risk notes, next-move wording) and NEVER deterministic risk ranking or flag_severity. Each derived signal must carry a source_ref like any other internal-evidence signal.

dimensions.name: Champion & multithreading
dimensions.definition: Is there a champion, and how many contacts are genuinely engaged? Single-threaded is a risk even when the call went well.
dimensions.healthy: Multiple contacts engaged across roles; a named champion sells internally when you're not in the room.
dimensions.at_risk: One contact carries the deal; no one advocates internally; champion has gone quiet or changed roles.

dimensions.name: Next step
dimensions.definition: Is a specific next step defined AND scheduled (date + owner), or vague ('circle back')?
dimensions.healthy: A concrete next action with a date and an owner ('Vanda sends RFP by June 6').
dimensions.at_risk: Vague language with no date ('we'll circle back', 'touch base soon', 'let us regroup internally').

dimensions.name: Economic buyer
dimensions.definition: Has the rep reached the person who signs, or only a user/influencer?
dimensions.healthy: Direct contact with the person who controls budget and signs; they've engaged on value, not just features.
dimensions.at_risk: Only talking to users/influencers; the signer is unnamed or unreached; champion 'will take it up the chain'.

dimensions.name: Decision process & criteria
dimensions.definition: Does the rep know how and against what this gets decided, and the steps to signature?
dimensions.healthy: Known evaluation criteria, named approval steps (e.g. RFP, security, procurement), and who owns each.
dimensions.at_risk: Decision process is assumed or unknown; surprise gates appear late; no map from here to signature.

dimensions.name: Pain & value
dimensions.definition: Is the pain explicit and quantified, or assumed? Is value tied to their numbers?
dimensions.healthy: Buyer states the pain in their own words and it's quantified; ROI tied to their metrics.
dimensions.at_risk: Pain is inferred by the rep, not voiced by the buyer; value is generic, not tied to their numbers.

dimensions.name: Momentum
dimensions.definition: Email latency trend, call cadence, days-since-last-activity vs. days-to-close, slipping close dates, going quiet.
dimensions.healthy: Regular cadence, fast prospect responses, recent activity well inside the close window.
dimensions.at_risk: Lengthening response times, growing gaps, stale activity vs. days-to-close, or a slipped close date.

dimensions.name: Competition
dimensions.definition: Known alternative including status quo / 'do nothing'? Is the rep positioned against it?
dimensions.healthy: Alternatives are named (including 'do nothing') and the rep is positioned against each on the buyer's criteria.
dimensions.at_risk: Competitors unknown or unaddressed; a formal RFP/bake-off where incumbents win on 'safe'; no differentiation.

dimensions.name: Paper & timeline
dimensions.definition: Is the close date realistic given remaining steps (legal, security, procurement)?
dimensions.healthy: Close date is backed by the remaining steps and their durations; paper process is in motion.
dimensions.at_risk: Close date can't survive the remaining steps; legal/security/procurement not started; forecast contradicts the date.
